summary: Implemented mobile responsive CSS and JSX changes for the CRM app. Added utility classes (grid-2, grid-3, page-header-row, form-row-flex, form-row-compact), media queries at 768px and 480px breakpoints, scrollable table wrappers, touch targets, and Kanban column height fix. Replaced inline styles with CSS classes across 7 page components.
output: All 10 implementation steps completed. Build passes (vite build). No new lint errors. Committed to feature/crm-mobile-responsive and pushed. Steps implemented: (1) Scrollable data tables on 6 pages, (2) Grid utility classes replacing 8+ inline styles, (3) Responsive page headers on 9 locations across 7 pages, (4) Flex form rows on 3 locations, (5) Phone metrics grid at 480px, (6) Util-row hours fix, (7) Button group stacking at 480px, (8) Kanban column height mobile fix, (9) Touch target sizing at 768px. Step 10 (PWA) skipped as optional.
